blocks.rationale: Core block - comprehensive overview of partnership exploration between Careerspan and Talent Collective
Core block - explicit commitments: Krista to test product, share with community, Careerspan to provide content/code
Contextual - Krista Tan profiling, Talent Collective structure (10 chapters), community dynamics, decision-making criteria
Contextual - Key decisions: focus on Product/Engineering roles, freemium model, free platform forever, community-first approach
Contextual - Immediate action items with owners and timeline (product testing, community posting, content sharing)
Contextual - Partnership positioning, market differentiation (warm intros vs. high/low signal channels), GTM strategy
Contextual - Explicit follow-ups: second call, community platform integration, product feedback loop
Contextual - Identified risks: market saturation, integration demands from hiring companies, community skepticism
Optional wildcard - Strategic quotes on warm intros, values alignment, community trust dynamics
Core block - Classification, tags, meeting system metadata

selection_rationale: Partnership discovery meeting with clear B2B/community integration opportunity. Core blocks (B01, B02, B26) always generated. Added B03_STAKEHOLDER_INTEL for external stakeholder profiling, B03_DECISIONS_MADE for strategic pivots (freemium, niche strategy), B05_ACTION_ITEMS for immediate commitments, B05_STRATEGIC_IMPLICATIONS for GTM positioning, B08_FOLLOW_UP_CONVERSATIONS for explicit next steps, B10_RISK_REGISTER for market and integration risks. Selected B21_KEY_MOMENTS as first wildcard for strategic quotes on warm introduction value proposition.
notes: Strong partnership exploration with concrete commitments. Community-first positioning aligns with Careerspan values. Key risks around market noise and hiring company gatekeeping identified and should be monitored.

warm_intros_scanned.note: B07 reviewed - no actionable warm intro opportunities
